title: thelypteris seramensis
intro: Thelypteris seramensis is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae, native to the island of Seram in Indonesia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Thelypteris seramensis include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
